description:
Discovered last session: memo-paper styling is duplicated in src/app/globals.css and src/index.css. The Next.js App Router only loads globals.css, so the index.css copy is dead weight (likely Vite-era leftover).

Tasks:
- Confirm src/index.css is not imported anywhere active
- Remove the duplicate memo-paper rules (or delete src/index.css entirely if unused)
- Verify visually that memo-paper components (FeaturedCryptid, BulletinTeaser pre-redesign references) still render correctly — though both have been redesigned to drawer-index style, so memo-paper may now be unused everywhere
title: Dedupe memo-paper CSS classes across globals.css and index.css
